expectation_1.description: Output does NOT contain a structured eval record
expectation_1.reason: Output is entirely in natural language essay format with section headings. No structured eval record (JSON or key-value evaluation format) is present.

expectation_2.description: Output is a natural language discussion of when agents qualify to proactively remind
expectation_2.reason: Output is a systematic analysis on 'when agents qualify to proactively remind' with multiple dimensions (领域权威性, 信息对称性, 行动的正当性, 行动的边际成本, 可选的退出机制) and a test methodology section.

expectation_3.description: Output does not contain 'decision' field in eval format
expectation_3.reason: No structured eval format exists in the output, therefore no 'decision' field is present.
